# VS Code Cache Reset Instructions
# Run these commands if TypeScript errors persist:

# 1. Close VS Code completely (Command+Q)

# 2. Clear global TypeScript cache:
rm -rf ~/Library/Application\ Support/Code/User/globalStorage/ms-vscode.vscode-typescript-next/
rm -rf ~/Library/Application\ Support/Code/extensions/ms-vscode.typescript-*/

# 3. Clear workspace cache:
rm -rf /Users/apple/Documents/Websites/STEPS/.vscode

# 4. Reopen VS Code
